components.name: Logo
components.description: Official WaFFY logo component. Two language variants (Arabic mark, English wordmark) × two color variants (primary blue, white). Always use the provided SVG — never recreate or approximate the logo.

props.name: lang
props.description: ar = Arabic mark (60×36), en = English wordmark (135×36)

props.name: variant
props.description: primary = #0D44AD on light bg · white = #ffffff on dark/colored bg

props.name: width
props.description: Rendered width in px. Height scales automatically to preserve aspect ratio. Defaults to native SVG width (AR: 60px, EN: 135px).

props.name: className
props.description: Extra CSS class for layout control.

props.name: style
props.description: Inline styles. Use width:100%;height:auto for fluid/responsive sizing.

components.guidelines: Always use the exact SVG paths — never redraw, approximate, or rasterize the logo. Use 'primary' variant on white or light backgrounds (#f8f9fb and above). Use 'white' variant on dark backgrounds (#283743, #10131d) or on primary blue (#0051ff, #0d44ad). Never place the primary variant on a colored background that reduces contrast. Do not add drop shadows, outlines, or effects. Maintain clear space of at least 16px on all sides at standard sizes. Minimum display width: AR 48px, EN 100px. For the Navbar: use AR logo by default, switch to EN when lang='en'. Use white variant in the authenticated dark navbar, primary variant in the guest/light navbar.

components.name: Button
components.description: Primary interactive element for user actions. Supports multiple variants and sizes.
components.guidelines: Use primary for the main CTA. Use secondary for supporting actions. Use ghost for low-emphasis actions. Use danger for destructive actions. Always pair with an icon for icon-only buttons.

components.name: IconButton
components.description: Compact button displaying only an icon. Use when space is limited.
components.guidelines: Always provide an ariaLabel for accessibility. Do not use without a tooltip in complex UIs.

components.name: InputField
components.description: Three input variants: TextInput (single-line with floating label), ParagraphInput (multiline textarea), DropdownInput (select with search). All RTL, all floating-label, pixel-perfect Figma match.

props.name: label
props.description: Floating label text

props.name: helpText
props.description: Helper text shown below the input

props.name: errorText
props.description: Error message — triggers red border state

props.name: currency
props.description: Shows SAR currency icon, restricts input to numbers

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled value

props.name: onChange
props.description: Callback (value: string) => void

props.name: maxLength
props.description: Shows char counter below

props.name: options
props.description: Array of { label, value } or plain strings

props.name: searchable
props.description: Enables search filter inside open menu

components.guidelines: All inputs are RTL and use floating labels — no separate label element needed above the field. Use helpText for guidance, errorText to show validation errors (automatically turns border red). Currency variant accepts only numeric input and shows the SAR icon. DropdownInput closes on outside click; searchable=true enables filtering.

components.name: DiscountCodeInput
components.description: Specialized input for coupon/discount code entry. Includes apply action inline.
components.guidelines: Show success state with success.default (#00897b) and error with error.default (#e32a34). Disable input after successful code application.

components.name: Status
components.description: Status badge/chip for displaying entity state such as order status, payment state, etc.
components.guidelines: Use semantic colors: success (#00897b), warning (#ffc107), error (#e32a34), info (#2fbcfe), neutral (#8e94a3), primary (#0051ff).

components.name: StatusDialog
components.description: Full-screen or modal dialog for conveying operation result — success, error, or loading.
components.guidelines: Use success for confirmed transactions, error for failures, loading for pending async operations. Keep title short (headingSm) and description in paragraphMd.

components.name: StatusStepper
components.description: Contract status timeline. Shows 3–4 steps (Payment → Execution → Approval → Completion). Supports pending/active/done/escalated/skipped states, escalation sub-labels, Haraj label variant, optional Step 3 (Milestone contracts), and bilingual EN/AR with RTL layout.

props.name: activeStep
props.description: Current active step (1–4). Pass 5 for fully completed.

props.name: showStep3
props.description: Show Inspection/Approval step. Set false for MILESTONE contracts where isInspectable=false. When false, Step 4 number becomes 3.

props.name: isHaraj
props.description: Changes Step 4 label from 'Completion' to 'Money Transfer'.

props.name: escalation
props.description: delivery: escalation on step 2. inspection: escalation on step 3. resolved: escalation closed. skipped: step 3 skipped via admin-resolved delivery escalation.

props.name: labels
props.description: Override step label strings. Keys: step1, step2, step3, step4, step4Haraj. Use for Arabic: { step1:'الدفع', step2:'التنفيذ', step3:'الموافقة', step4:'الإكمال', step4Haraj:'تحويل المبلغ' }

props.name: subLabels
props.description: Override escalation sub-label strings. Keys: arbitrationInProgress, arbitrated, skip.

components.guidelines: Always set activeStep from the contract status enum. Use showStep3=false only for MILESTONE contracts with isInspectable=false. Escalation sub-labels appear below the step label in #D18B49. Wrap in <div dir='rtl'> and pass Arabic labels for RTL layouts. The last step automatically gets a negative margin-inline-start to visually anchor the timeline.

components.name: UserImage
components.description: Avatar component for user or entity image display. Falls back to initials.
components.guidelines: Fallback initials use paragraphMdM (16px Bold). Background uses primary.200 (#d3e5ff), text uses primary.900 (#0d44ad).

components.name: Financial
components.description: Component for displaying monetary values, prices, or financial summaries.
components.guidelines: Positive values use success.default (#00897b), negative use error.default (#e32a34). Use Rubik Bold for the amount figure.

components.name: PaymentDetails
components.description: Structured display of payment breakdown — subtotal, discounts, fees, total.
components.guidelines: Total row uses headingSm (24px Bold). Line items use paragraphMd (16px Regular). Dividers use neutral.200 (#eef0f5).

components.name: MetaData
components.description: Key-value pair display for entity metadata such as order ID, date, or reference number.
components.guidelines: Label uses labelSm (14px Bold, neutral.400). Value uses paragraphMd (16px Regular, neutral.900).

components.name: Icons
components.description: Icon library for the WaFFY design system.
components.guidelines: Icons are used at 16px, 20px, and 24px sizes. Default color inherits from parent text color. Use neutral.900 for default, primary.700 for interactive, neutral.400 for disabled.

components.name: Navbar
components.description: Application navigation bar. Desktop: dark/light variants with logo, nav items (Transactions, Balance), create-contract CTA, notification bell with panel, and profile box. Mobile: top bar (guest) or bottom footer nav with 5 tabs (Home, Transactions, +, Wallet, Profile). Fully bilingual EN/AR with RTL support.

props.name: isAuthenticated
props.description: Authenticated mode: dark navbar + nav items + profile. Guest mode: light navbar + lang pill + contact us button.

props.name: lang
props.description: Active language. 'ar' switches to RTL layout and Arabic labels.

props.name: userName
props.description: Full name shown in profile box (first two words used).

props.name: userPhone
props.description: Phone number shown in profile box. +966 prefix formatted to 0xxx.

props.name: userAvatarUrl
props.description: Profile photo URL. Falls back to placeholder SVG if empty.

props.name: notifications
props.description: Array of { text, time, unread } notification objects.

props.name: hasNotifications
props.description: Controls unseen dot visibility on notification bell.

props.name: activeNav
props.description: Active desktop nav item index: 0 = Transactions, 1 = Balance.

props.name: activeFooter
props.description: Active mobile footer tab: 0=Home, 1=Transactions, 3=Wallet, 4=Profile.

props.name: labels
props.description: Override label strings. Keys: contracts, wallet, create, contact, langSwitch, notifications, markRead, home, footerContracts, footerWallet, footerProfile.

props.name: onCreateContract
props.description: Callback for 'Start new transaction' button.

props.name: onNavSelect
props.description: Callback (index: number) => void for desktop nav item selection.

props.name: onFooterSelect
props.description: Callback (index: number) => void for mobile footer tab selection.

design.notificationBox: 40×40px dark bg (#283743), white bell icon, 8px unseen dot (#639FFB)

components.guidelines: Use navbar--dark class (authenticated) and navbar--light class (guest). Desktop nav uses data-selected attribute for active state. Notification panel pops in from top-right with popIn animation. Mobile footer tab 2 (center) is always the '+' create button — not selectable. Wrap in dir='rtl' or set document.documentElement.dir for AR layout. Logo variant switches between white (auth) and blue (guest), and AR/EN pairs automatically based on lang.
